title: Ubiquiti PowerBeam5 AC 500, PBE-5AC-500
description: The PBE-5AC-500 is a suitable device for PtP connections with a 27dBi antenna gain from the airMAX AC series, which achieves very high transmission speeds and a stable connection even in a noisy environment. The unit is compatible only with other airMAX AC products and is designed for outdoor use. In the unit is possible to set very wild channel width 10/20/30/40/50/60 and 80MHz , real throughput in good condition may by up to 450Mbps+ can be achieved using 256QAM airMAX® ac products offer improved latency, noise immunity , scalability and significantly increased throughput performance Ubiquitiâs InnerFeed technology integrates the radio into the feedhorn of an antenna, so there is no need for cables to connect the radio to the antenna. This improves performance because it eliminates cable losses The form factor of the PowerBeamâ¢ ac features the highest gain for its size. The PowerBeam acâs excellent beam directivity provides the best performance in high-noise environments The PowerBeam ac PBE-5AC-500 includes a protective radome to shield the radio from nature's harshest elements Device (feed) Parabolic antenna Gigabit PoE injector Power cord Plastic feed house Holder Radom cover
